name: Bank of America ATM
description_short: Bank of America Walk-Up ATM located at 130 Fulton Street in New York, NY, offering 24-hour cash access and deposit services with cardless and multilingual support.
description_long:
Bank of America is one of the largest banking institutions in the United States, with an extensive network of ATMs across the country. This particular profile represents a specific Walk-Up ATM location at 130 Fulton Street in New York, NY 10038, which is part of Bank of America's broader financial services infrastructure.

This Walk-Up ATM offers standard ATM services available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The machine accepts both cash withdrawals and deposits, as well as credit card payments. It features cardless ATM technology, allowing customers to conduct transactions using tap-to-pay cards or smartphones with digital wallets. The ATM provides instructions in multiple languages including English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, and Portuguese, making it accessible to a diverse customer base in the New York area.

What distinguishes this ATM is its cardless transaction capability and multilingual support, which cater to New York's diverse population and tech-savvy customers. The location is inside a building (not a drive-thru), operates around the clock, and accepts both withdrawals and deposits. Bank of America's mobile banking app integration allows customers to use their smartphones for contactless transactions, enhancing convenience for on-the-go banking.

This is a basic ATM access point with no advisory services, loan products, or account opening capabilities at the location itself. It functions solely as a cash access and deposit device. Customers seeking personalized financial guidance, account services, or loan products would need to visit a full-service Bank of America branch. The temporary service limitations noted on the page suggest potential availability issues that customers should verify before visiting.
pros: 24-hour operation provides round-the-clock cash access and deposit services
Cardless ATM technology allows transactions via smartphone digital wallet or tap-to-pay cards
Accepts both cash withdrawals and deposits plus credit card payments in one location
Multilingual interface in 7 languages including English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, and Portuguese
Located inside a building for weather-protected access
Integrated with Bank of America's mobile banking app for seamless digital transactions
cons: Current alert indicates one or more ATMs at this location may have temporarily limited services
No in-person banking specialists or advisory services available at this ATM-only location
Cannot open accounts, apply for loans, or conduct complex banking transactions at this location
Limited to the single address provided with no branch services nearby mentioned
best_for: Bank of America customers needing 24/7 cash access in Lower Manhattan
Mobile-first users comfortable using smartphones or contactless cards for ATM transactions
Non-English speakers in the New York area who need multilingual ATM instructions
diagnosis: This profile is best for Bank of America customers in the Lower Manhattan area who need convenient 24/7 cash access and deposit capabilities. The main caveat is that this is an ATM-only location with no branch services, meaning customers cannot access financial advice, open accounts, or conduct complex banking transactions at this specific address.
services: Credit card payment processing via ATM
Cardless ATM transactions using digital wallet
Multilingual instructions (English, Spanish, Chinese, Korean, French, Russian, Portuguese)
Mobile banking app integration for account access
